violations.text: Raw animal foods such as sausage links were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as potatoes in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets for 1 door prep unit (by warewashing area) and 2 door prep unit (on line) were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2026

-The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium solution for the 3 bay sink. -The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Reduced Oxygen Packaged Fish was observed thawing without oxygen being allowed back into the package. ROP fish product must have oxygen allowed back into the package before thawing. Fish product was observed at 41 D F. Product was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the salad prep unit, and the low boy in the prep room. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2024

The prep sink is lacking an air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2024
